name: Owner Decision Flow
description: Leasing prepares an owner decision packet with idempotent approval tracking and required decline reasons.

stages.name: Prepare Decision Packet
stages.description: Assemble a concise decision packet with the facts an owner needs.

steps.title: Assemble owner decision packet
steps.instructions: Assemble the owner decision packet with the recommendation, evidence, risk notes, and decision options.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare an owner decision packet. Do not send externally; this is a draft for approval.

steps.title: Review packet quality
steps.instructions: Confirm the packet is complete, neutral, and includes any compliance caveats before release.
steps.human_prompt: Review the owner decision packet before any owner-facing release.

stages.name: Capture Owner Decision
stages.description: Route the decision request and capture an idempotent response.

steps.title: Stage owner decision request
steps.instructions: Stage the owner request with approve/edit/decline options. Decline must require a reason. Do not bypass outbound approval.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage owner decision request and idempotency metadata; no external send without approval.

steps.title: Wait for owner response
steps.instructions: Do not complete until the owner response is captured or the request is explicitly cancelled.
steps.human_prompt: Owner response required before this workflow can proceed.

stages.name: Apply Decision
stages.description: Apply the approved path and document the outcome.

steps.title: Apply owner decision
steps.instructions: Apply the owner decision to the underlying process, preserving the response and decline reason if present.
steps.dispatch_body: Apply captured owner decision and record the outcome.

steps.title: Record decision audit note
steps.instructions: Record the decision source, timestamp, actor, and next-state result in the audit trail.
steps.dispatch_body: Record owner decision evidence and next-state result.
